lines.speaker: Pilgrim
lines.text: Nilsal to you once more, fellow traveller.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello again! How are things going?

lines.speaker: Pilgrim
lines.text: I'm still on route to the Proudspire, but I'm having a bit of a break to enjoy the scenery. Walking the Pilgrim Path can be long and arduous.

lines.speaker: Pilgrim
lines.text: Oh, nilsal, fellow traveller. You don't see many other people out here.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there! Where are you heading to?

lines.speaker: Pilgrim
lines.text: The Proudspire of course! I'm walking the Pilgrim Path.

lines.speaker: Pilgrim
lines.text: It is a sacred pilgrimage between the Teomat and the Proudspire. I do it every year, as do many others.

lines.speaker: Pilgrim
lines.text: The hardest part is the last bit: Reaching the summit of the Proudspire. Only upon touching the obelisk at the top is your journey complete.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I see. Well good luck with your journey.

lines.speaker: Pilgrim
lines.text: Thank you, traveller. May the sun light your way.

lines.speaker: Pilgrim
lines.text: Thank you, traveller. May the sun light your way.
